description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.11.4 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Add a global before_script that runs npm install gitbook-cli -g and then gitbook install. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs gitbook build . public, publishes the public/ folder as the pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. The pipeline should generate a GitLab Pages site from the built GitBook.
